reasoning.research_depth: Decent research covering financial topics with data and examples. More accessible than academic but reasonably well-sourced.
reasoning.signal_noise: Good content structure with clear explanations. Some clickbait tendencies but generally focused on delivering the information.
reasoning.originality: Competent financial education format. Topics are interesting but the presentation style follows common YouTube patterns.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Mixed longevity. Some content covers timeless financial principles while other videos are tied to current events that will date.
